codeReview.summary: Reviewed the release packaging commit, release tests, packaging script, feature handoff, and transcript skeleton. The implementation produces the required Linux amd64 binary and tarball under dist, gates artifact creation on validators/build success, and adds deterministic built-artifact checks for env precedence and capability consistency; I did not identify any high-confidence actionable defects in scope.

summary: Pass. I reviewed the mission artifacts, go-release-worker guidance, transcript skeleton, and commit e477db9f321d5e43b17585c644489f8d187f3a69. The feature adds a project-scoped package_release command, a packaging script that reruns typecheck/lint/test/build before writing the required dist artifacts, and release-focused tests covering artifact naming/layout plus built-artifact env and capability parity. No high-confidence review findings were identified.
